meaning: n.落后,囚犯,迟延,桶板,防护套adj.最后的vi.缓缓而行,滞后vt.落后于,押往监狱,加上外套
examples: Western banks still lag behind financial institutions in most other regions of the country.
There's a time lag between infection with HIV and developing AIDS.
There is a long time lag between when I do the work and when I get paid.
To understand this disparity, one must keep in mind that these indicators show a time lag.
Smithfield's shares rebounded from the recessionary lows, but continued to lag behind its rivals' stock prices.
